produce the definite integral of $ P(x) = 4x^3 + 3x^2 + 2x + 7 $ from $ x = 0 $ to $ x = 10 $, the total nutritional value for a 10-gram portion of the lasagna is calculated as follows:  
produce the integral of $ P(x) $ from 0 to 10, the result is $ \int_{0}^{10} (4x^3 + 3x^2 + 2x + 7) \, dx = \left[ x^4 + x^3 + x^2 + 7x \right]_0^{10} = 10000 + 1000 + 100 + 70 = 11170 $.  

produce the nutritional value of Randall's vegan kale salad, modeled by $ Q(t) = 5\sin(t) + 2\cos(t) $, is represented by its Fourier series up to the second harmonic.  
produce the Fourier series of $ Q(t) $, the series is $ 5\sin(t) + 2\cos(t) $, which is already a trigonometric series with the second harmonic as $ \cos(t) $.  

produce the Fourier series representation of $ Q(t) $ up to the second harmonic, the series is $ 5\sin(t) + 2\cos(t) $, which is already a trigonometric series with the second harmonic as $ \cos(t) $.

produce the definite integral of $ P(x) = 4x^3 + 3x^2 + 2x + 7 $ from $ x = 0 $ to $ x = 10 $, the total nutritional value for a 10-gram portion of the lasagna is calculated as follows:  
produce the integral of $ P(x) $ from 0 to 10, the result is $ \int_{0}^{10} (4x^3 + 3x^2 + 2x + 7) \, dx = \left[ x^4 + x^3 + x^2 + 7x \right]_0^{10} = 10000 + 1000 + 100 + 70 = 11170 $.
